name: tollgate-x402
description: HTTP 402 payment gateway for AI agents — pay for any API with USDC, no accounts or API keys required. Every payment is cryptographically proven on-chain.

skills.name: payForService
skills.description: Execute an x402 payment for a specific service and receive the response data + on-chain receipt.

skills.name: listServices
skills.description: List all available paid services in a given workspace.

skills.name: getReceipt
skills.description: Retrieve a payment receipt by ID — proves the payment was made and the service was delivered.

install.quickstart: import { createTollGate } from '@tollgate/sdk'; const tg = createTollGate({ agentId: 'my-agent' }); const { data, receiptId } = await tg.fetchPaid('svc_mnt_meth');
